domain: Bumblebee buzz pollination resonance — thoracic 120-400Hz vibration tuned to specific anther filament resonant frequency releases pollen.
specific_mechanism: Resonant frequency match between bee vibration source and anther mechanical impedance enables pollen release; mismatch → no release.
llm_application: BUZZ-RES: spectral-frequency-gated attention. For each layer, compute FFT of query vectors across feature dimension; assign each KV pair a resonant frequency band on creation. Attention computes only between Q and KVs where Q's spectral peak matches KV's resonant band. Other KVs are dormant ('pollen locked').
novelty_claim: Spectral routing attention (FreqFormer R293 territory) routes by frequency. Massive values (2502.01563) studies KV magnitude. BUZZ-RES requires explicit query-KV resonant-band matching, which is more specific than spectral routing.
